name: Iron Range Golf Performance
address: 5501 N Interchange Ave, Sioux Falls, SD 57107
about: Iron Range Golf Performance is an indoor golf facility that provides year-round training through simulator bays and dedicated short-game areas. The venue utilizes TrackMan launch monitors and video analysis technology to offer detailed feedback on ball flight, club delivery, and putting performance. Services include private and group lessons, junior coaching programs, lunch clinics, club fitting, and tiered memberships that provide access to the simulators during non-peak hours.
why_golfers_like_it: Tour-caliber TrackMan technology for precise data and ball tracking
Comprehensive skill development programs from juniors to adults
Unlimited simulator access included in higher-tier memberships
Data-driven feedback combining technology with professional coaching

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food services available on-site.
No mention of alcohol services available on-site.

simulator_hardware.notes: TrackMan launch monitors installed in simulator bays for full-swing and wedge sessions

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The facility provides club fitting services and it's recommended to bring your own clubs, though clubs are typically available for use during lessons and practice sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food services available on-site, suggesting a BYOB policy may be in place, though it's not explicitly stated.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time for 18 holes is not specified, but simulator rental options are available by the hour (60 minutes), allowing for flexible session lengths.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Iron Range offers junior coaching programs, junior camps, and age-appropriate coaching with a focus on fundamentals and fun, making it suitable for children and youth.
